basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) Statistician Notification 2026 has been released on 20 July 2026 on the official website tmc.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the TMC Statistician Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: M.Sc. in Statistics. Experience in relevant field is desirable.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TMC Statistician Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TMC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download TMC Statistician Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download TMC Statistician Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TMC Statistician Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TMC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TMC Statistician Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TMC Statistician Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: M.Sc. in Statistics. Experience in relevant field is desirable.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TMC Statistician Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TMC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TMC Statistician recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the TMC Statistician posts is 27th July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Statistician post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Statistics. Experience in a relevant field is considered desirable for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Statistician position at TMC?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Statistician post is 50 years. There are no specific minimum age requirements mentioned.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the TMC Statistician recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Statistician role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Statistician post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 45,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Statistician post?
faq.answer: Tata Memorial Centre is recruiting for a total of 2 vacancies for the Statistician position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the TMC Statistician recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves multiple stages, including screening, an online MCQ test, and a final interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job at TMC?
faq.answer: The job offered for the Statistician post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for the Statistician posts is Mumbai, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the TMC Statistician recruitment?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of Tata Memorial Centre or via the direct application link provided in the Important Links section before the last date.
